sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10626" key="a)ntitumpani/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιτυμπᾰνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n10626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beat drums in rivalry with,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βρονταῖς</foreign> prob. cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> Vat.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
